hook.summary: Three friends playing the game in a quiet hotel room.
hook.visual_action: Three people in a hotel bed with game footage overlaid on top.
hook.text_overlay: POV: After a long day out, the hotel room is dead silent... nothing but the sounds of this game

scene_flow: Three friends lying in a hotel bed playing the game simultaneously.
Split-screen gameplay showing different color themes and block-clearing.
Satisfying sound effects play as blocks are cleared and combos are achieved.
Final screen displays the game logo and app store download buttons.
on_screen_text: POV: After a long day out, the hotel room is dead silent... nothing but the sounds of this game
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy satisfying, low-stress puzzle games for relaxation.
